'''langovo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:feature|feature]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| l-ng-v
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:feature|feature]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| langovo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:længeveth|længeveth]] || [[word:længevej|længevej]] || [[word:længevesh|længevesh]] || [[word:længeve|længeve]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:langongovoth|langongovoth]] || [[word:langongovoj|langongovoj]] || [[word:langongovosh|langongovosh]] || [[word:langongovo|langongovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:langovoth|langovoth]] || [[word:langovoj|langovoj]] || [[word:langovosh|langovosh]] || [[word:langovo|langovo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:langofvoth|langofvoth]] || [[word:langofvoj|langofvoj]] || [[word:langofvosh|langofvosh]] || [[word:langofvof|langofvof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:langovotho|langovotho]] || [[word:langovojo|langovojo]] || [[word:langovosho|langovosho]] || [[word:langovoko|langovoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:langovoth|langovoth]] || [[word:langovoj|langovoj]] || [[word:langovosh|langovosh]] || [[word:langovo|langovo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:langovothol|langovothol]] || [[word:langovojol|langovojol]] || [[word:langovoshol|langovoshol]] || [[word:langovokol|langovokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:langovothotho|langovothotho]] || [[word:langovojojo|langovojojo]] || [[word:langovoshosho|langovoshosho]] || [[word:langovoko|langovoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:langovothon|langovothon]] || [[word:langovojon|langovojon]] || [[word:langovoshon|langovoshon]] || [[word:langovokon|langovokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:langovothoro|langovothoro]] || [[word:langovojoro|langovojoro]] || [[word:langovoshoro|langovoshoro]] || [[word:langovokoro|langovokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
